title: Adroit
description: Gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

title: Clone
description: This card can be duplicated at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].

title: Corrupted
description: Deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage, but lose [blue]2[/blue] HP.

title: Glam
description: This card has [gold]Replay[/gold] once per combat.

title: Goopy
description: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].

title: Imbued
description: This card is played automatically at the start of each combat.

title: Instinct
description: This card's attack damage is doubled.

title: Momentum
description: Increase this card's attack damage by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] this combat when played.
extra_card_text: Increase this card's damage by {Amount} this combat.

title: Nimble
description: Increases [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

title: Perfect Fit
description: Whenever this would be shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], place it on the top instead.

title: Royally Approved
description: This card has [gold]Innate[/gold] and [gold]Retain[/gold].

title: Sharp
description: Increases damage on this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

title: Slither
description: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from [blue]0[/blue] to [blue]3[/blue].

title: Slumbering Essence
description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue] until it is played.

title: Soul's Power
description: This card loses [gold]Exhaust[/gold].

title: Sown
description: The first time you play this card each combat, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.

restrictions: Strike or Defend-tagged Basic cards only
title: Spiral
description: This card gains [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].

title: Steady
description: This card gains [gold]Retain[/gold].

title: Swift
description: The first time you play this card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
extra_card_text: Draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} the first time this is played.

title: Tezcatara's Ember
description: Costs [blue]0[/blue] and gains [gold]Eternal[/gold].

title: Vigorous
description: The first time this card is played, it deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
